footer_powered_by: Powered by Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
upload_subtitle: tàbí tẹ láti ṣayẹwo / lo kamẹra
select_prompt: Yan èyí tó jọ ọgbin rẹ jù
select_subtitle: Tẹ kárọ lati yan, lẹhìn náà jẹ́rìí si
result_treatment_sub: Tẹ̀lé àwọn igbésẹ̀ wọ̀nyí láti tọ́jú igi rẹ
result_prevention_sub: Pa igi rẹ mọ́ ní ilera pẹ̀lú àwọn igbésẹ̀ wọ̀nyí
result_healthy_msg: Ìròyìn rere! Igi rẹ dà bíi ẹni tí ó ní ilera.
result_healthy_sub: Tẹ̀lé àwọn ìmọ̀ràn wọ̀nyí láti pa á sí bẹ́ẹ̀.
result_at_risk_msg: Igi rẹ kò tíì ní àrùn ṣùgbọ́n ó ń fi àwọn àmì àkọ́kọ́ hàn.
result_infected_msg: A rí àrùn lórí igi rẹ.
result_infected_sub: Tẹ̀lé ètò ìtọ́jú nísàlẹ̀ yìí ní kíákíá.
result_export_footer: Powered by AgroSense — Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
error_unexpected_response: Server returned an unexpected response. Check Django logs.
error_network_prod_cross_origin: Cannot reach the API (wrong URL, CORS, or backend waking/sleeping on Render). Confirm VITE_API_BASE_URL has no typo; on Render set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to this site's exact https origin (and preview URLs if you use them). Retry after 30-60s on cold start.
error_network_prod_same_origin: Cannot reach the API. Same-origin /api should proxy via repo-root vercel.json. Update the rewrite destination to your Render URL, redeploy Vercel, or set VITE_API_BASE_URL to that URL and redeploy.
error_network_dev: Cannot reach the API. Local dev: (1) In backend: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 (2) In frontend: npm run dev. Leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty in frontend/.env so /api proxies to Django.
error_file_type: Jọwọ gba fọto jpg, png, tàbí webp.
error_no_results: Kò sí ọgbin tó bá. Gbìyànjú fọto tó gbangba.
history_empty: No scans yet. Scan your first plant!
history_empty_sub: Your past diagnoses will appear here.
history_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all scan history?
settings_built_with: Built with Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
lab_precision_body: Our models are trained on over 500,000 verified pathological samples of regional crops.
expert_insights_body: Receive instant organic treatment recommendations and preventative strategies.
camera_error_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions and try again.
rightpanel_home_desc: Gbé àwòrán èyíkéyìí igi sókè kí o sì gba ìdánwò ilera tí AI ń ṣàkóso láì tó ìṣẹ́jú mẹ́jọ.
rightpanel_feature_langs_body: Ìdánwò ní Zulu, Xhosa, Swahili àti pọ̀
rightpanel_result_title: Èyí ni ohun tí a rí.
rightpanel_result_desc: Ṣe àyẹ̀wò ìpò ilera igi rẹ kí o sì tẹ̀lé àwọn igbésẹ̀ tí a dábàá nísàlẹ̀.
rightpanel_tip_1: Ya àwòrán ní òjò óòrùn àdábàá fún àbájáde tó dára
rightpanel_tip_2: Fi àyíka sí àwọn ewé tàbí ọ̀pá tí àrùn bá
rightpanel_tip_3: Ṣayẹ̀wò lọ́sẹ̀-ọsẹ̀ láti ṣọ́ ìdágbárùn igi
rightpanel_tip_4: Pín àbájáde pẹ̀lú onímọ̀ ọgbìn ní agbègbè rẹ
rightpanel_history_desc: Àwọn àyẹ̀wò mẹ́júnlá rẹ a fipamọ́ láìfọwọ́yí. Tẹ ẹnikẹ́ni láti wo ìdánwò náà tó péye.
rightpanel_history_auto_body: Àyẹ̀wò kọ̀ọ̀kan wà ní ẹ̀rọ rẹ
rightpanel_history_limit_body: Àwọn tó péye jìnnà a yọ láìfọwọ́yí
rightpanel_settings_desc: Ṣe ààtò èdè àti àwọn àyàn rẹ. Àwọn ààtò nàá fipamọ́ láìfọwọ́yí lórí ẹ̀rọ rẹ.
rightpanel_supported_langs_title: Àwọn èdè tí a ṣe atilẹyin
rightpanel_supported_langs_sub: Àwọn ohun elo UI àtúmọ̀ ìdánwò AI
